response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio lyrics matched the reference JSON perfectly for 'GIRLS' LEGEND U'. Addressed live vocal ad-libs like 'それせーの！' instead of the lyric sheet's 'トレセーン！'. 2. JSON Usage: The JSON reference lyrics were fully utilized to translate complex horse-racing-themed terminology (e.g., 'たかたった', '芝と砂', '上がりタイム') into accurate English equivalents. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely mapped to vocal bursts. Long instrumental segments (00:05.100 - 00:52.300 and 03:59.500 - 04:20.500) are left completely silent to follow the Audio Rule. Instantly transitioned adjacent lines where speakers left no breath room to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: 離さない

subtitles.english: Stare at me, Paradise Lost.

subtitles.english: We finally all met!

subtitles.english: Turf, dirt, and your final training plan.

subtitles.original: turn up！(turn up！）
subtitles.english: Turn up! (Turn up!)

subtitles.original: 声出せ叫べ(wo oh oh)
subtitles.english: Raise your voice and shout (wo oh oh)!

subtitles.original: それせーの！ファイ！(オー！)ファイ！(オー！)
subtitles.english: Ready, set, go! Fight! (Oh!) Fight! (Oh!)

subtitles.original: たかたった全力上がりタイム
subtitles.english: Galloping along, giving it my all in the final stretch!

subtitles.original: ゆずれない夢の途中(wow wow)
subtitles.english: In the middle of our unyielding dream (wow wow)...

subtitles.original: 始めようここから最高story
subtitles.english: let's start the greatest story from here.

subtitles.english: (Wow wow wow)

subtitles.original: (o oh o oh...おっおっおーー！)
subtitles.english: (O oh o oh... Oh, oh, oh!)

subtitles.english: To the land of our dreams (borrowing a little courage)...

subtitles.english: the memories we shared (cherishing this fleeting moment).

subtitles.original: もうドキドキもトキメキも抑えられないたまんない
subtitles.english: I can't contain the excitement and fluttering anymore!

subtitles.original: 熱いハラハラが止まらない
subtitles.english: The thrilling suspense won't stop!

subtitles.original: キミと走り競いゴール目指し
subtitles.english: With you, racing together, aiming for the finish line...

subtitles.original: 遥か響け届けmusic
subtitles.english: resound far and wide, reach us, music!

subtitles.original: ずっとずっとずっとずっと想い夢がきっと叶うなら
subtitles.english: My feelings forever and ever... if our dream will surely come true,

subtitles.original: あの日キミに感じた何かを信じて
subtitles.english: believing in that something I felt from you that day.

subtitles.original: 春も夏も秋も冬も超え願い焦がれ走れ
subtitles.english: Overcoming spring, summer, autumn, and winter, longing and running...
